page_metadata.biotools__summary: BPrimm (Bayesian and Penalized regression in multiple loci mapping) includes a set of tools for simultaneously multiple loci mapping, and two novel methods named the Bayesian adaptive Lasso and the Iterative Adaptive Lasso
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BPrimm (Bayesian and Penalized regression in multiple loci mapping) includes a set of tools for simultaneously multiple loci mapping, and two novel methods named the Bayesian adaptive Lasso and the Iterative Adaptive Lasso
